h1.visual_description: Not present on this sample page; typically reserved for chapter or main section titles.

h2.visual_description: Bold text within a light-red shaded rectangular box, used for diagram titles. Often split into a label (e.g., 'Diagram 2') and a descriptive title.
h2.example_text: Diagram 2 Participation of Institutions in the VNR Meeting of Indonesia 2021.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Figure or diagram caption identifier, typically bolded and contained within a shaded background box.
Footnote reference markers within the body text or captions.
Footnote content located at the bottom of the page, preceded by a numeric identifier.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Numeric footnotes with superscript in-text citations and full references at the bottom of the page.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page numbers centered at the bottom margin; Footnote block at the bottom separated from main content by a thin horizontal rule.
